'''tavatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallsword|smallsword]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallsword|smallsword]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tavatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tævæthæth|tævæthæth]] || [[word:tævæthæj|tævæthæj]] || [[word:tævæthæsh|tævæthæsh]] || [[word:tævæthæ|tævæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tavavathath|tavavathath]] || [[word:tavavathaj|tavavathaj]] || [[word:tavavathash|tavavathash]] || [[word:tavavatha|tavavatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tavathath|tavathath]] || [[word:tavathaj|tavathaj]] || [[word:tavathash|tavathash]] || [[word:tavatha|tavatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tavafthath|tavafthath]] || [[word:tavafthaj|tavafthaj]] || [[word:tavafthash|tavafthash]] || [[word:tavafthaf|tavafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tavathatha|tavathatha]] || [[word:tavathaja|tavathaja]] || [[word:tavathasha|tavathasha]] || [[word:tavathaka|tavathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tavathath|tavathath]] || [[word:tavathaj|tavathaj]] || [[word:tavathash|tavathash]] || [[word:tavatha|tavatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tavathathal|tavathathal]] || [[word:tavathajal|tavathajal]] || [[word:tavathashal|tavathashal]] || [[word:tavathakal|tavathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tavathathatha|tavathathatha]] || [[word:tavathajaja|tavathajaja]] || [[word:tavathashasha|tavathashasha]] || [[word:tavathaka|tavathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tavathathan|tavathathan]] || [[word:tavathajan|tavathajan]] || [[word:tavathashan|tavathashan]] || [[word:tavathakan|tavathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tavathathaoro|tavathathaoro]] || [[word:tavathajaoro|tavathajaoro]] || [[word:tavathashaoro|tavathashaoro]] || [[word:tavathakaoro|tavathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
